case_title: WINDOW CLEANERS UNION VS DELGADILLO SALVADOR

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06 TRIAL OF APR-24-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
